name: @tootallnate/ff7-flevel
description: Pure-JS parser + renderer for Final Fantasy VII PC field scenes (`flevel.lgp` entries). Decompresses the LZSS-wrapped FieldModule container, then decodes Section 4 (Palette) and Section 9 (Background) to reconstruct the pre-rendered tile-based backgrounds. Composites all four layers (BG / movables / midground / foreground) to an RGBA pixel buffer ready for display or PNG export. Works on both PC- and Switch-port FF7 (Switch ships the PC asset tree verbatim).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
